title: Beyond Adventures
description: Beyond Adventures is a feature-rich mod introducing missions, entities, a dynamic currency system, and much more.
body:
Beyond Adventures

https://discord.gg/E8ZRbA8X3J

Beyond Adventures is a feature-rich mod designed to expand your world with missions, contract mechanics, a server-integrated currency system, and much more.

Core Features

  • Progressive Mission System
  • Contract Mechanics with server integration
  • Currency System for rewards and progression
  • Unique items, skills, and progression paths obtainable through missions

Singleplayer Experience

In singleplayer, Beyond Adventures introduces a wide range of missions that progressively increase in difficulty as days pass.

Complete missions to earn valuable rewards, including:

  • Magisteel Gear
  • Coins
  • Reset Scrolls
  • Magic Tomes
  • Skills
  • And more

As you grow stronger, you’ll encounter missions tied to powerful characters from Tensura Reincarnated and NEB. By completing these missions, players can earn and unlock their skills, allowing for deeper progression and build customization.

  • Rimuru
  • Hinata
  • Luminous

Progress through these encounters to unlock new abilities, strengthen your character, and continue advancing your journey.

Recommended Addons

For the best singleplayer experience, it is highly recommended to use:

  • Better Subs
  • Tensura NEB

These addons complement Beyond Adventures and enhance overall gameplay depth.

All Quests can be adjusted via a datapack!

Server Integration

A server-side version of this mod is required to properly interact with the contract and currency systems.

Disclaimer

All assets included in Beyond Adventures, including but not limited to models, animations, sounds, and UIs, are strictly prohibited from use outside their intended purpose within the mission system unless explicitly authorized by TRBeyond.
